parsed_output.justification: During the Night phase, James and Mitchell are explicitly heard interacting during the Werewolf wake-up call, with Mitchell stating he saw another werewolf and questioning James. In the Day phase, both players lie about their roles (James claiming to be the Troublemaker and Mitchell claiming to be a Mason) and coordinate to divert suspicion toward Paul. Since James and Mitchell are confirmed Werewolves by the night phase dialogue, voting for either of them ensures a victory for Team Village.
